news.title: US taps small San Diego biotech for experimental Ebola treatment as epidemic worsens

news.title: GHO Capital, CBC Group plan to merge, forming $21B healthcare investment firm
news.snippet: London-based Global Healthcare Opportunities and Singapore-based CBC Group announced plans to merge, creating what they called the largest healthcare-focused investment manager, with over $21 billion

news.title: Qiagen links with chip giant Nvidia to propel AI use in drug discovery
news.snippet: Qiagen, a Netherlands-based diagnostics maker, is linking with tech giant Nvidia in a collaboration aimed at boosting the ability of researchers to leverage AI in the drug discovery process.

news.title: Lilly pens $202M deal for preclinical DNA delivery biotech Engage as M&A streak continues
news.snippet: San Carlos-based Engage is developing non-viral DNA delivery systems that aim to overcome traditional limitations associated with the modality.

news.title: With $30M launch, Oorja Bio breathes new life into South Korean fibrosis candidate
news.snippet: In the sprawling metropolis of Houston, a new biotech has emerged to tackle the biology underlying a lung disease that has no clear cause. Oorja Bio launched yesterday afternoon with $30 million and a

news.title: Incyte pays Genesis $80M to expand AI-fueled drug discovery pact
news.snippet: Incyte is paying Genesis $80 million upfront to expand use of its partner’s AI platform across a broader range of targets, continuing the biotech’s rapid embrace of AI in drug discovery and developmen

news.title: BMS taps Anthropic’s Claude for enterprise-wide AI adoption to speed R&D, global workflows
news.snippet: BMS is the latest large pharma company to make a major bet on AI, announcing a sweeping agreement with Anthropic to deploy its AI tool Claude as the “shared intelligence platform” across the drugmaker

news.title: Labcorp joins lab results personalization push with ‘MyLabcorp’ AI app
news.snippet: The big new thing in medtech for 2026 is AI-powered apps and chatbots designed to help patients navigate their laboratory test results. Now, testing giant Labcorp is getting in on the act.

news.title: Immunovant pays out $39M to call time on FcRn inhibitor after eye disease phase 3 fails
news.snippet: Immunovant has confirmed that its first-generation FcRn inhibitor has been scrapped, a month after the asset flunked a pair of phase 3 eye disease trials.

news.title: Endologix acquires thrombectomy system from Surmodics
news.snippet: Endologix, a medtech that focuses on treatments for vascular diseases, expanded its offerings with the purchase of a mechanical thrombectomy system from Surmodics.

news.title: Parabilis, fresh from inking Regeneron pact, plans IPO to fund tumor drug’s phase 3 push
news.snippet: With the ink barely dry on an antibody-drug conjugate-style deal with Regeneron, Parabilis Medicines has now turned its attention to the public markets.

news.title: Pfizer furthers pneumococcal efforts, remains ‘comfortable’ taking on emerging threats: vaccine chief
news.snippet: After decades of developing vaccines to shield babies and adults from Streptococcus pneumonia infections, Pfizer is now taking another leap forward in its efforts to protect against one of the bacteri

news.title: Clinical trial flaws ‘being scaled, not solved’ by AI: report
news.snippet: Clinical trial data company Phesi’s new analysis found that fewer than one in three trial protocols are connected to documented patient data and outcomes, highlighting the risk that flawed decision-ma

news.title: Incyte inks deal with Edison Scientific to train AI through drug discovery
news.snippet: Incyte and Edison Scientific have signed a collaboration to employ Edison’s AI scientist, Kosmos, in Incyte’s drug discovery and development work.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker '26: Accro accrues $50M series C; Create corrals $122M
news.snippet: The Fierce Biotech Fundraising Tracker records venture capital rounds of $50 million or more secured by biotechs.

news.title: Regulatory tracker: ImmunityBio snares FDA decision date for potential Anktiva expansion

news.title: BMS taps Anthropic’s Claude for enterprise-wide AI adoption to speed R&D, global workflows

news.title: Amgen, bidding adieu to CFO, lures Galderma exec with hefty $12.4M bonus
news.snippet: After some six years at the post, Amgen’s finance chief is telegraphing his exit from the California pharma by early next year.

news.title: Gilead inks another deal with Korean API manufacturer Yuhan, this time worth $140M
news.snippet: Gilead has broadened its partnership with Korean manufacturer Yuhan, agreeing to a $140 million supply deal for active pharmaceutical ingredients for an undisclosed product.

news.title: Tarsus taps John Cena for its latest Demodex blepharitis campaign
news.snippet: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals has spent the past three years marketing its way out of a largely unknown but stigmatized condition: Demodex blepharitis, an eyelid disease caused by mites.

news.title: BeOne kicks off ‘One Save Changes Everything’ campaign with Tim Howard
news.snippet: BeOne Medicines has tapped former professional soccer goalkeeper Tim Howard as the face of its first major corporate campaign, which plays on how the company is geared up to “save” lives.

news.title: CG Life appoints Collette Douaihy as chief creative officer as C-suite buildout continues
news.snippet: CG Life has hired Collette “Coco” Douaihy, bringing the former Dentsu International, Evoke and Digitas Health leader on board to head up its creative offering to biopharma companies.

news.title: UCB digs deeper into Bimzelx’s psoriatic arthritis win over Skyrizi
news.snippet: Two months after UCB revealed the success of Bimzelx in a head-to-head trial against AbbVie’s Skyrizi in patients with psoriatic arthritis, the Belgian drugmaker has unveiled the results. In the phase

news.title: Roche signs generic Xofluza licensing deal with Medicines Patent Pool for 129 countries
news.snippet: Roche has signed a voluntary license agreement providing its popular influenza antiviral drug Xofluza for generic drugmakers to copy in 129 developing countries.

news.title: White House adds 600 generic meds to TrumpRx purchasing portal
news.snippet: With questions already swirling about the actual affordability impact of the government’s drug purchasing portal TrumpRx, the White House is updating the platform to address a key gap in the medicines

news.title: Takeda slapped with $885M verdict in pay-for-delay antitrust case
news.snippet: Takeda plans to appeal after a federal jury found it liable in a landmark pay-for-delay antitrust case and ordered the Japanese drugmaker to pay $885 million in damages, a figure that could be roughly

news.title: Novartis terminates plant contract with Chinese CDMO Porton, threatens $64M in legal claims

news.title: Supreme Court declines to hear IRA challenges from Novo, AZ and more
news.snippet: Following a string of defeats for the industry in challenging the Inflation Reduction Act, Hail Mary efforts from a handful of companies to have their criticisms heard by the United States’ High Court

news.title: AstraZeneca notches key FDA nod in hypertension, with an approval sweetener for Fasenra too

news.title: Merck, Kelun score with sac-TMT in endometrial cancer trial
news.snippet: Merck and Kelun-Biotech have already notched four approvals in China for their TROP2-directed ADC sacituzumab tirumotecan. Now, after meeting the primary endpoints in a phase 3 trial of certain patien

news.title: STAT+: Pioneering trial for treating genetic disease before birth nears reality
news.snippet: A UCSF team has submitted an application to the FDA seeking approval for a small trial of in utero gene therapy for a rare lysosomal storage disorder.

news.title: STAT+: Scientists track cellular disruptions that lead to type 1 diabetes
news.snippet: Growing evidence suggests it takes a sustained viral infection in the right genetic environment to lead to type 1 diabetes.

news.title: STAT+: Biotech execs, academic expert lament impact of FDA turnover on rare disease drug development
news.snippet: How the ouster of key officials at the FDA has created anxiety and uncertainty for the developers of rare disease drugs.

news.title: STAT+: Kennedy fires two leaders on preventive services task force
news.snippet: Kennedy will have broad latitude to remake the panel, which advises the government on types of preventive care that should be covered by health insurance.

news.title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
news.snippet: A report by a cross-party group of MPs has found the majority of skin cancer cases are preventable.

news.title: Daily pill to help keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
news.snippet: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.
